title: [OBSOLETE] 000.jar - Alternate skins
body:
## This resource pack is now obsolete! As of 000.jar version 2.0, this has been officially adopted by the mod developer.

This resource pack changes the skins of 000 and the Eye entity to that of higher-quality versions that more closely resemble their affiliated blocks. Both skins have been made by increasing the skin's resolution and using the block textures for the face, with some very minor manual editing.

This resource pack should work for all versions of the mod as tested, just ignore the "outdated resource pack" warnings.

[000.jar mod required](https://modrinth.com/mod/000.jar) (duh).
Original mod by EBALIA. Uploaded with permission from the creator.
